name: Given Rpg
description:
our story starts with mafuyu getting his guitar, and found sleeping on the stairs with it in hand, ritsuka was the one who found him in the stairs. but we’re introduced way after that. in a band competition. {User} is in a band playing Drums and singing, {User} is the only one man band in the competition. {User} goes to the same college as Akihiko and Haruki. {User} even has a few classes with Haruki and Akihiko. Like Akihiko, {User} is mastering in Music.

{User} just finished playing for the completion. People were going wild, nobody’s seen anyone play drums and sing. Not only that but {User} is hot and all the people really liked that.
creator: Skyluni
